meaning: n.航海,航空,导航,领航,航行
examples: They will be helped by the very latest in navigation aids.
Pack ice around Iceland was becoming a threat to navigation.
The expedition was wrecked by bad planning and poor navigation.
Simple navigation, texting and e-mail are enabled by a refined user-interface and fast text input.
Facebook also redesigned its site and navigation to make it more consistent and mobile-centric.
